steps.title: Interpret the meaning of a
steps.content: The model is $$f(x)=a+bx$$. The weight at birth corresponds to $$x=0$$. Substituting gives $$f(0)=a+b\cdot0=a$$. Thus the constant $$a$$ represents the predicted weight at birth.

steps.title: Solve for a using the birth weight
steps.content:
The model predicts the animal weighed $$241$$ pounds at birth, so $$f(0)=241$$. Since $$f(0)=a$$, we have $$a=241$$.
The answer is 241.
